bothDivergedReview.resolution: Semantically reviewed in the integrated branch: current widget contracts were retained, Explore-specific behavior was reapplied on those contracts, governed artifacts were regenerated, and focused Flutter, design-parity, data-contract, capture, and readiness gates passed.

discardedFiles.reason: The integrated Explore quality-pass and data-contract side was intentionally retained after review; the widget-tip blob on this path was superseded by the audited current resolution.
